items.title: 'Enjoy the show. Ignore the war': Venice Biennale faces backlash after including Russia
items.dek: Protests have taken place at the prestigious arts fair over the inclusion of Russia for the first time since the full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
items.body: Protests have taken place at the prestigious arts fair over the inclusion of Russia for the first time since the full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gas tax: How beer fuelled a debate on Australia's energy giants
items.dek: Campaigners say Australia is giving away its gas 'for free' and should tax exports like Norway and Qatar.
items.body: Campaigners say Australia is giving away its gas 'for free' and should tax exports like Norway and Qatar.
items.author: IriLine Desk
